allow: PowerShell($s = try { Get-Content '.claude/session.state' -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json } catch { [PSCustomObject]@{} }; $ts = Get-Date -Format 'yyyyMMddHHmmss'; $s | Add-Member -NotePropertyName 'commit_token' -NotePropertyValue "swd-submit-$ts" -Force; $s | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 10 | Set-Content '.claude/session.state')

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "C:\\Program Files", "C:\\Program Files \(x86\)", "$env:LOCALAPPDATA", "$env:APPDATA" -Directory -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.Name -match '^node|^nvm|^nvs|^fnm' } | Select-Object FullName)
PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Path "." -Recurse | Where-Object { $_.Name -match "sw-" } | Select-Object FullName, Extension | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell($s = try { Get-Content '.claude/session.state' -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json } catch { [PSCustomObject]@{} }; $ts = Get-Date -Format 'yyyyMMddHHmmss'; $s | Add-Member -NotePropertyName 'commit_token' -NotePropertyValue "swd-submit-$ts" -Force; $s | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 10 | Set-Content '.claude/session.state'; Write-Output "commit_token set: swd-submit-$ts")

hooks.command: $ok = (git pull --ff-only 2>&1); if ($LASTEXITCODE -eq 0 -and "$ok" -notmatch 'Already up to date') { Write-Output '{"systemMessage":"[ToolKit] Skills auto-updated to latest — reload if skill menu feels stale"}' }

$d = try { [Console]::In.ReadToEnd() | ConvertFrom-Json } catch { $null }; $fp = $d.tool_input.file_path; if ($fp -match '\.(cs|ts|sql|py|go)$') { $s = try { Get-Content '.claude/session.state' -Raw -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ConvertFrom-Json } catch { $null }; if (-not $s -or -not $s.work_done) { Write-Output '{"continue":false,"stopReason":"BLOCKED: Run /swd-start [Story ID] before writing code. No active story in session."}'; exit 1 } }

$d = try { [Console]::In.ReadToEnd() | ConvertFrom-Json } catch { $null }; $cmd = $d.tool_input.command; if ($cmd -match 'git commit') { $s = try { Get-Content '.claude/session.state' -Raw -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ConvertFrom-Json } catch { $null }; if (-not $s -or -not $s.commit_token) { Write-Output '{"continue":false,"stopReason":"BLOCKED: Use /swd-submit to commit — runs /swd-dev-review, updates ADO, README, and CHANGELOG."}'; exit 1 } }

$d = try { [Console]::In.ReadToEnd() | ConvertFrom-Json } catch { $null }; $cmd = if ($d.tool_input.command) { $d.tool_input.command } else { '' }; $isDelete = $cmd -match '\brm\b|\brmdir\b|Remove-Item|\bdel\b'; if ($isDelete -and ($cmd -match '\.claude')) { Write-Output '{"continue":false,"stopReason":"BLOCKED: .claude/ is completely protected. No files may be deleted from .claude/ under any circumstance — it is the ToolKit command library."}'; exit 1 } elseif ($isDelete -and ($cmd -match '\bdocs[/\\]|\bdocs\b')) { Write-Output '{"continue":false,"stopReason":"BLOCKED: docs/ files are protected. To delete a docs/ file, explicitly state the full file path and your reason — Claude must receive direct confirmation before proceeding."}'; exit 1 }
Write-Output '[SmartWorkz Toolkit] File written. ENFORCE §9: Run your build command NOW and confirm pass before continuing.'

$s = try { Get-Content '.claude/session.state' -Raw -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ConvertFrom-Json } catch { $null }; if ($s -and $s.story_id -and -not $s.wrap_done) { $sid = $s.story_id -replace '"', ''; Write-Output ('{"continue":false,"stopReason":"BLOCKED: Run /swd-submit before ending session. Story ' + $sid + ' has no checkpoint."}'); exit 1 }

smartworkz-ado.description: Azure DevOps work item integration — create Epics, Stories, Tasks directly in Claude Code sessions
